title: Cobblemon Midnight
description: A Dark themed GUI Texture Pack for the Cobblemon Mod. Cobblemon GUIs Only.
body:
![Cobblemon Midnight Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26abb292f12cbe374b4fc34428806058dcf06801_0.webp)
Cobblemon Midnight is a Cobblemon GUI Resource Pack that makes the textures Black Out dark, or like at Midnight! This resource pack has smooth textures that span from the Pokemon Summary Screen, to the First Pokemon Screen, to even the new Pokedex Screen. It keeps the beauty of the original with a darker tone that fits perfectly with other already existing Dark GUI Texture Packs!
# Midnight Interface Update
![Interface Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98677b2cdf2e9e1e2130cb9363b05eeac2987e75.png)
Midnight Interface is Cobblemon Midnight's 2.0 Update! This update adds tons of mod support & base gui's of Minecraft in the Midnight Color Scheme.
## [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface)
Cobblemon Interface has granted permission to use their pack as a base for Modded & Vanilla GUIs as it is very modified. All GUIs use the Midnight Color scheme & there are many changes that differenciate from the Normal Cobblemon Interface. These include: Updated Textures, Changed Colors, Some Changed Shapes, new Mods supported, & more! Make sure to check out the Original at [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface).
## Screens
A Variety of Screens are supported, and here are a few example images to showcase:
### Pokedex
![Showcase of the dark elements in the Pokedex](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3a48a069f9fbee7e0ad056ff5aa094f4024a971.png)
### PC (Personal Computer)
![A Showcase of in the computer with a pokemon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5f3247c23083309e3a5ecfa81957ea019477ab4.png)
### Summary
![Pokemon in the Pokemon Summary Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa114d8d1f0c32cb754f21ea2b27e4a404f562ba.png)
